# Dbuild.dev Full Agent Guide

Portfolio and blog about developer tools, AI, agents, local-first apps, and experiments.

## Discovery

- Site: https://dbuild.dev/
- Corpus index: https://dbuild.dev/index.json
- Content index mirror: https://dbuild.dev/api/content/index.json
- Sitemap: https://dbuild.dev/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://dbuild.dev/robots.txt

## Stats

- Projects: 17
- Articles: 34
- Tags: 46
- Languages: en, fr

## Projects

### FormEdible

- URL: https://dbuild.dev/projects/FormEdible/
- Repository: https://github.com/DimitriGilbert/FormEdible
- Website: https://dimitrigilbert.github.io/Formedible/
- Tags: Shadcn, Registry, form, hook, react, typescript, zod
- Summary: A React hook for creating schema-driven forms with TanStack Form and shadcn/ui components.
- Related articles: 2
  - [Formedible, the Ultimate React Form Library for 2025](https://dbuild.dev/blog/projects-formedible/)
  - [Formedible, la Bibliothèque de Formulaires React Ultime pour 2025](https://dbuild.dev/blog/projects-formedible-fr/)

- Website: https://litechat.dbuild.dev
- Tags: pwa, ai, chat-application, agents, llm, local-llm
- Summary: A modern, local first AI chat app for your browser.
- Related articles: 2
  - [LiteChat - A local first and self hostable AI chat app for power user](https://dbuild.dev/blog/projects-litechat-litechat-a-local-first-and-self-hostable-ai-chat-app-for-power-user/)

### arcade-vibe

- URL: https://dbuild.dev/projects/arcade-vibe/
- Repository: https://github.com/DimitriGilbert/arcade-vibe
- Website: https://arcade-vibe.app
- Tags: ai, gaming, prompt-engineering, nextjs, trpc, typescript, drizzle, postgresql
- Summary: A competitive prompt engineering platform disguised as a retro arcade. Write one prompt, pick your model, and see if your AI-generated game tops the monthly leaderboard.
- Related articles: 2
  - [arcade-vibe — One Prompt, One Shot, May the Best Prompt Win](https://dbuild.dev/blog/projects-arcade-vibe/)
  - [arcade-vibe — Un Prompt, Un Shot, Que le Meilleur Prompt Gagne](https://dbuild.dev/blog/projects-arcade-vibe-fr/)

### parseArger

- URL: https://dbuild.dev/projects/parseArger/
- Repository: https://github.com/DimitriGilbert/parseArger
- Website: https://dimitrigilbert.github.io/parseArger/
- Tags: parseArger, bash, cli
- Summary: Standalone bash argument parsing code generator.
- Related articles: 7
  - [ParseArger Nested options](https://dbuild.dev/blog/projects-parsearger-nested-options/)
  - [Story of a simple update](https://dbuild.dev/blog/projects-mdd-story-of-a-simple-update/)

  - [ParseArger, create bash scripts you'll want to use](https://dbuild.dev/blog/projects-parsearger-create-bash-scripts-youll-want-to-use/)

### lmaafy

- URL: https://dbuild.dev/projects/lmaafy/
- Repository: https://github.com/DimitriGilbert/lmaafy
- Website: https://github.com/DimitriGilbert/lmaafy
- Tags: ai, fun, react, tanstack, typescript
- Summary: The LMGTFY of the AI age — generate a shareable link that plays a typing animation then redirects to an AI chatbot with your prompt pre-filled.
- Related articles: 2

- Website: https://github.com/DimitriGilbert/LimitAID
- Tags: bash, cli, ai, developer-tools, monitoring, parseArger
- Summary: A bash CLI that shows quota, balance, and usage limits for AI providers (Codex, OpenRouter, Z.ai) from one place.
- Related articles: 0

- Summary: A local-first, video-oriented RSS client for following creators across YouTube, Odysee, and PeerTube from one fast three-column interface.
- Related articles: 0

### mpv-web-control

- URL: https://dbuild.dev/projects/mpv-web-control/
- Repository: https://github.com/DimitriGilbert/mpv-web-control
- Website: https://github.com/DimitriGilbert/mpv-web-control
- Tags: mpv, audio, homelab, raspberry-pi, react, hono, typescript
- Summary: A local-network web remote for mpv — control your audio playback from any browser on your LAN. Built for Raspberry Pi and homelab setups.
- Related articles: 2
  - [mpv-web-control — your music, your phone, your LAN](https://dbuild.dev/blog/projects-mpv-web-control/)

### lmaafy — Laisse-moi demander à l'IA pour toi

- URL: https://dbuild.dev/blog/projects-lmaafy-fr/
- Language: fr
- Published: 2026-05-20T11:00:00+01:00
- Updated: unknown
- Category: General
- Tags: ai, fun, react, tanstack, typescript
- Summary: Le LMGTFY de l'ère de l'IA. Un lien qui joue une animation de frappe toute satisfaisante, puis redirige vers un chatbot IA avec ton prompt déjà rempli. Mesquin ? Peut-être. Satisfaisant ? Oh que oui.
- Related projects: lmaafy
- Language alternates: en https://dbuild.dev/blog/projects-lmaafy/, fr https://dbuild.dev/blog/projects-lmaafy-fr/

### mpv-web-control — your music, your phone, your LAN

- URL: https://dbuild.dev/blog/projects-mpv-web-control/
- Language: en
- Published: 2026-05-20T11:00:00+01:00
- Updated: unknown
- Category: General
- Tags: mpv, audio, homelab, raspberry-pi, react, hono, typescript
- Summary: A web remote for mpv running on a Raspberry Pi. Browse your music library from your phone, control playback, manage playlists. No app, no database, no cloud — just your browser and your speakers.
- Related projects: mpv-web-control
- Language alternates: en https://dbuild.dev/blog/projects-mpv-web-control/, fr https://dbuild.dev/blog/projects-mpv-web-control-fr/

### mpv-web-control — ta musique, ton téléphone, ton réseau local

- URL: https://dbuild.dev/blog/projects-mpv-web-control-fr/
- Language: fr
- Published: 2026-05-20T11:00:00+01:00
- Updated: unknown
- Category: General
- Tags: mpv, audio, homelab, raspberry-pi, react, hono, typescript
- Summary: Une télécommande web pour mpv qui tourne sur un Raspberry Pi. Parcours ta bibliothèque musicale depuis ton téléphone, contrôle la lecture, gère les playlists. Pas d'app, pas de base de données, pas de cloud — juste ton navigateur et tes enceintes.
- Related projects: mpv-web-control
- Language alternates: en https://dbuild.dev/blog/projects-mpv-web-control/, fr https://dbuild.dev/blog/projects-mpv-web-control-fr/

### Skills are the DRY of prompt engineering, you should use them and create your own

- URL: https://dbuild.dev/blog/projects-ai-skills-skills-are-the-dry-of-prompt-engineering/
- Language: unknown
- Published: 2026-03-03T14:00:00.000Z
- Updated: unknown
- Category: General
- Tags: ai, skills
- Summary: Just like I use to create my own libraries and helpers I reused in most my projects, I now create skills so i don't rewrite the same prompts over and over again
- Related projects: none
- Language alternates: none

### Les Skills sont le DRY du prompt engineering, tu devrais les utiliser et créer les tiennes

- URL: https://dbuild.dev/blog/projects-ai-skills-les-skills-sont-le-dry-du-prompt-engineering/
- Language: unknown
- Published: 2026-03-03T13:59:00.000Z
- Updated: unknown
- Category: General
- Tags: ai, skills
- Summary: Comme j'avais l'habitude de créer mes propres bibliothèques et helpers que je réutilisais dans la plupart de mes projets, je crée maintenant des skills pour ne pas réécrire les mêmes prompts encore et encore
- Related projects: none
- Language alternates: none

### Formedible, the Ultimate React Form Library for 2025

- URL: https://dbuild.dev/blog/projects-formedible/
- Language: en
- Published: 2025-01-17T10:00:00+01:00
- Updated: unknown
- Category: General
- Tags: form, react, typescript, tanstack, zod
- Summary: A sophisticated wrapper around TanStack Form v1 with 22+ built-in field types, multi-step wizards, conditional logic, analytics, and enterprise-grade features. Built with React 19, TypeScript, Zod, and shadcn/ui.
- Related projects: FormEdible
- Language alternates: en https://dbuild.dev/blog/projects-formedible/, fr https://dbuild.dev/blog/projects-formedible-fr/

### Formedible, la Bibliothèque de Formulaires React Ultime pour 2025

- URL: https://dbuild.dev/blog/projects-formedible-fr/
- Language: fr
- Published: 2025-01-17T10:00:00+01:00
- Updated: unknown
- Category: General
- Tags: form, react, typescript, tanstack, zod, french
- Summary: Un wrapper sophistiqué autour de TanStack Form v1 avec plus de 22 types de champs intégrés, assistants multi-étapes, logique conditionnelle, analytics et fonctionnalités de niveau entreprise. Construit avec React 19, TypeScript, Zod et shadcn/ui.
- Related projects: FormEdible
- Language alternates: en https://dbuild.dev/blog/projects-formedible/, fr https://dbuild.dev/blog/projects-formedible-fr/

- Summary: Regroup and look around, wandering is fun, but, sometimes you need to know where you want to go.
